description: Constrained Linkage: cross-table join + predicates + single scoring signal. W6(s, P, J, K) = TopK{FSS(P ∪ P_J, s)}. 100 queries over facts_50k × paper; join on fact_text_emb <-> abstract_emb (L2 ≤ tau), score by facts_50k.mol_ecfp jaccard; predicates on both sides (facts 0-3, paper 1-3).

value: Journal of the American Chemical Society
